name: FreezOut
summary: CTF, Two forts face off in the arctic regions of the north.
description: Blue fort to the north, red to the south.  There are two ways into the fort (maybe more if you're clever.)  Plenty of goodies for warriors, wizards, and conjurers.

name: Inferno
summary: DM, King of the Realm, Elimination suitable for 4 - 16 players
